name: IRCTC BOBCARD
exclusions: fuel spends eligible for surcharge waiver do not earn reward points
IRCTC rewards require linking the card loyalty number with IRCTC login ID
taxes and charges excluded as per BOBCARD terms
milestoneBenefits: 1,000 bonus reward points on a single transaction of Rs 1,000 or more within 45 days of card issuance
additionalBenefits: Up to 40 reward points per Rs 100 on train ticket bookings through IRCTC website and mobile app
4 reward points per Rs 100 on grocery and departmental store spends
2 reward points per Rs 100 on other categories including train ticket purchases on IRCTC
4 complimentary railway lounge accesses per year
1% fuel surcharge waiver on fuel transactions between Rs 500 and Rs 3,000, capped at Rs 100 per statement
Up to 3 lifetime free add-on cards

salaried: Eligibility details to be confirmed during Bank of Baroda application
selfEmployed: Eligibility details to be confirmed during Bank of Baroda application
